_comment: DEPRECATED — prefer the unified config (Tier 2bis.4). See ./example-gitnexus.json for the new canonical format. This legacy file still works (with a deprecation warning to stderr), but new repos should use `.gitnexus.json > domains` instead. Example .gitnexus-domains.json for hmm_studio: copy to <repo>/.gitnexus-domains.json and tweak. Globs support ** (any path), * (no slashes), and literals. First match wins, so order most-specific first.
